# Onea Africa

> South African technology company providing managed connectivity, home and business WiFi, IT support, digital marketing, and communications services.

Onea Africa (Pty) Ltd is a South African technology company registered in 2016. The company helps homes and businesses with reliable internet access, managed WiFi, IT support, digital growth, and communications support. Onea Africa works with network partners including Openserve and Telkom while keeping the customer experience, onboarding, support, and service guidance under the Onea Africa brand.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://onea.africa/): Onea Africa overview, service pillars, trust signals, and customer routes.
- [Solutions](https://onea.africa/solutions): Main solutions hub for connectivity, WiFi, IT, LTE, and digital services.
- [Connectivity](https://onea.africa/connectivity): Operational connectivity page covering network, field, and platform access.
- [Pricing](https://onea.africa/pricing): Fibre, LTE, and Telkom application entry points.
- [Telkom Application](https://onea.africa/telkom-application): Direct Telkom service application route.
- [Client Portal](https://onea.africa/client-portal): Client support, speed check, prepaid fibre help, WiFi extension, and support request route.
- [Case Studies](https://onea.africa/case-studies): Client work and delivery examples.
- [Blog](https://onea.africa/blog): Connectivity, IT, marketing, and business insights.
- [Team](https://onea.africa/team): Onea Africa team page and role placeholders.

## Solution Pages

- [Openserve Business Fibre](https://onea.africa/solutions/openserve-business-fibre): Fibre package guidance and Telkom application path.
- [LTE Enterprise Packages](https://onea.africa/solutions/lte-enterprise-packages): LTE connectivity and mobile broadband package route.
- [Home WiFi Networking](https://onea.africa/solutions/home-wifi-networking): Home and business WiFi design, dead-zone removal, coverage improvement, and managed network support.
- [Managed IT Support](https://onea.africa/solutions/managed-it-support): IT support, infrastructure, cloud, and operational technology assistance.
- [Corporate Digital Marketing](https://onea.africa/solutions/corporate-digital-marketing): Digital marketing, lead generation, campaigns, and growth support.

## Services

- Managed fibre and LTE connectivity
- Home and business WiFi design
- WiFi dead-zone removal and signal improvement
- Managed IT support
- Digital marketing and lead generation
- Public relations and communications
- Client onboarding and support coordination

## Company Facts

- Registered company: Onea Africa (Pty) Ltd
- Registration number: 2016/461132/07
- VAT number: 4550322707
- CSD number: MAAA0662773
- B-BBEE Level 1 Contributor
- Microsoft Partner ID: 7111532
- Openserve and Telkom aligned connectivity services

## Contact

- Email: connect@onea.co.za
- Support: helpdesk@onea.co.za
- WhatsApp: +27 69 464 4663
- Website: https://onea.africa/
- Location: Pretoria, Gauteng, South Africa
